programmes.show_description: An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
Crime mystery with Dylan Neal and Brooke Burns. Murder is on the menu as a culinary expert and a no-nonsense detective team up to investigate a shocking crime at a five-star restaurant. (2015)
A mother's grief threatens to destroy both her life and that of her young son. Starring Bree Williamson. (2017)
Thriller starring Aria Sirvaitis. When her daughter becomes the target of relentless bullying, one mother uncovers a dark secret - and a deadly plot she can't ignore (2021).
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
Homeland Security: The team investigate when a suspected terror plot is unearthed in Washington. Meanwhile, Myles searches for an art forger after he is stung for $10,000.
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.

Baby Boom: Can Dr Sloan and the team hold their nerve when a man holds an entire antenatal class hostage?
...Murder: Crime mystery with Dick Van Dyke. When his long-time patient is accused of murder, amateur sleuth Dr Mark Sloan is convinced he's innocent. (1992)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
...Murder: Crime mystery with Dick Van Dyke. When his long-time patient is accused of murder, amateur sleuth Dr Mark Sloan is convinced he's innocent. (1992)
Track Of A Soldier: Jessica has a less than peaceful time during her holiday at a friend's mountain lodge. Is Jessica's latest murder investigation linked to blackmail and a $2m diamond?
Evidence Of Malice: Cabot Cove's Deputy Sheriff, Andy Bloom, becomes a prime suspect for murder after incriminating evidence is found in his car. Can Jessica prove his innocence?
Southern Double-Cross: Does Jessica get more than she bargained for during a trip to Australia? Will a dispute over 130,000 acres of land prove to be a motive for murder?
Race To Death: Jessica investigates the intense rivalry between two yacht captains when one of them is murdered on the eve of a prestigious competition.
What You Don't Know Can Kill You: Joy soon turns to sorrow when Seth's niece comes to Cabot Cove ahead of her wedding.
Mrs. Parker's Revenge: A room mix-up soon reveals a complicated case involving a lethal chemical virus, nation security agents and a ruthless arms dealer.
Death By Demographics: The last ever episode of the hugely popular crime series. Jessica investigates when the manager of a radio station is killed.
Trials And Tribulations: Jessica must prove her innocence after she is accused of perjury during a murder investigation.
Deadly Misunderstanding: A bicycle accident forces Jessica to hire a typist to finish her latest manuscript. Can Jessica prove her new typist's innocence after she is accused of murder?
See You In Court Baby: Can insurance investigator Dennis Stranton prove who really murdered an infamous divorce lawyer?
Dark thriller starring Denzel Washington and Angelina Jolie. Can a paralysed forensics expert and a rookie cop unravel a serial killer's cryptic crime-scene clues before he strikes again (1999)?
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
Dark thriller starring Denzel Washington and Angelina Jolie. Can a paralysed forensics expert and a rookie cop unravel a serial killer's cryptic crime-scene clues before he strikes again (1999)?
...Unseen: Murder mystery with Courtney Thorne-Smith. While at a 17th century archaeological site, Emma and her students find a very modern-day body - and help an FBI agent excavate the truth. (2017)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
...Unseen: Murder mystery with Courtney Thorne-Smith. While at a 17th century archaeological site, Emma and her students find a very modern-day body - and help an FBI agent excavate the truth. (2017)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
Thriller starring Lesa Wilson. A nanny's dream job turns into a nightmare when she discovers the child in her care was kidnapped - and his 'parents' will do anything to keep the truth buried. (2023)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
Thriller starring Hannah Barefoot. After surviving a train wreck, a married woman loses her memory. As the pieces of her old life start to come together, will the truth tear her apart? (2017)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.

Talked to Death: Dr Sloan investigates when a daytime talk show host is killed in suspicious circumstances. Can he unearth whether the presenter's death was a result of a tragic prank?
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
...Free Man: Jessica travels to the Deep South to investigate the brutal killing of a slave in the 1860's. Can she unearth the truth and ultimately prove the man's innocence? (2001)
...Southwest: Jessica finds herself in danger when she investigates the disappearance of a fellow train passenger. Can she fend off a number of dubious characters and solve the mystery? (1997)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
...Southwest: Jessica finds herself in danger when she investigates the disappearance of a fellow train passenger. Can she fend off a number of dubious characters and solve the mystery? (1997)
...Riddle: Jessica travels to Ireland to attend the reading of her friend's will. With the will containing a number of cryptic clues, is Jessica hunting for treasure or a murderer? (2003)

programmes.show_description: ... Die For: Jessica is faced with a challenging murder investigation when a Russian author of a book on the KGB is killed. (2000)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.

programmes.show_name: Murder, She Wrote: A Story To...
programmes.show_description: ... Die For: Jessica is faced with a challenging murder investigation when a Russian author of a book on the KGB is killed. (2000)
Hannigan's Wake: Jessica is asked to re-open a 16-year-old murder investigation by a dying author who fears that the wrong man was convicted of the crime.
The Family Jewels: Jessica is embroiled in a murder investigation after a chauffeur is killed during a fundraiser. Will an extramarital affair lead Jessica to the murderer?
Tone Death: The team enters the unexpectedly dangerous world of competitive acapella when the body of an ex-con turned singer is discovered in the same theatre as Martha's latest show.
Memory Kings: Carrie investigates the murder of a prominent scientist who helped her to understand hyperthymesia.
Who's Bugging Mary?: Brandi is charged with murder and drug trafficking by Agt. O'Connor, leaving Mary to try to uncover the reasons behind his vendetta against her sister.
...Bitter Than Death: Murder mystery with Courtney Thorne-Smith. Emma investigates when the president of an archaeological organisation is poisoned - unearthing more than she bargained for! (2019)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
